name: list_payments
description: List all payments on your Mollie account, sorted by creation date (newest first). Results are paginated. Use the 'from' parameter to navigate through pages by passing the ID of the last payment from the previous page.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start listing from this payment ID onwards. Used for pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of payments to return per page. Default is 50, max is 250.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Filter payments by a specific website profile ID (for organizations with multiple profiles).
